title: Kamen Rider Gotchard: Graduations
original_title: 仮面ライダーガッチャード GRADUATIONS
overview: Taking place after the events of the Kamen Rider Gotchard TV series, the time is approaching for each of them to leave for their individual tomorrows. After graduating from high school, Houtaro Ichinose's dream remains the same: to become a big-time alchemist. Renge Icho and Sabimaru Tsuruhara are also moving on to the next stage. As for Rinne Kudo...
